user.title: Set up TCL · Cool Living · Comfee AC
user.description: Select the infrared emitter pointed at your air conditioner.

data_description.infrared_entity_id: The infrared emitter entity (e.g. an ESPHome IR blaster) to use for sending commands.

abort.already_configured: This infrared emitter is already configured for a TCL112AC unit.
abort.no_emitters: No infrared emitters found. Set up an infrared proxy (e.g. an ESPHome IR blaster) first.
